name: Frozen Cookie-Wiches
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Simple Summer Recipes  use 20 oz package of refrigerated
chocolate chip cookies.
Heat oven to 350 degrees. Bake cookies according to package directions.
Cool completely. In medium bowl, combine all filling ingredients; mix well.
Spread filling about 1/2 inch thick on bottom side of one cookie. Place another
cookie, bottom side down, on filling, pressing lightly. Repeat with
remaining cookies and filling. Place on large cookie sheet; freeze until
firm, about 4 hours. Wrap individually in foil or plastic wrap; store in
freezer.
